title: Cannon Car Wash
author: Eric Rolph
tag_line: Triggered rollers and spray, then a fully-contained 360 km/h launch
description: Drive a Gavril D-Series through a detailed Gridmap V2 car wash. Entering the bay starts five animated brushes and twelve spray misters. Once the truck is fully contained in the exit trigger, a 3-2-1-GO countdown holds the vehicle before launching it at 360 km/h toward the crash target. The rigid car-wash structure is also available in the Props vehicle selector.
update_summary: Prepared the mod for public Repository review: author-qualified all runtime identifiers, removed loose and unused archive content, moved Lua into BeamNG's scenario-owned lifecycle, added the scenario preview, preserved trigger and wash behavior, and added deterministic distribution validation.
